entry.title: Schedule jobs for consolidation tasks with dynamic period
entry.content:
Is is possible to use the schedule for consolidations tasks app to release data each month for the current month? We are looking to create a recurring job that release data from universal journal on the 5th day of each month for the previous month. However, when setting the parameters we still have to set a month, see yellow marker.

What I would be looking for is a an option to say that the data should be release for the previous month. So when the job is executed in February, it should release data for Jan of the current year. Is that possible?

And what does the option highlighted in blue do?

Thanks,
Arnold

entry.title: Re: Filter on a Date Field, defaulted with the current date
entry.content:
Hi Andrea,

Please check this blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/datasphere-populating-dynamic-default-values-in-analytical-model-variables/ba-p/14009854

Best Regards,
Siddu

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content: @karl_kessler any news on this? is it possible now?

entry.title: Re: Calculating Energy Consumption in the Product Carbon Footprint
entry.content:
Hello,

While fiddling around with Allocations and Energy Flow Models, I realized I should probably just go with CCFs to get the Carbon Footprint per Product. Seems my approach was wrong.

Thanks again for your help!

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on...
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to ask further, we want to have a calculation type/condition for a fixed amount, and we want that this fixed amount is somehow spread/allocated proportionally to the quantities of each material (SKU) in an invoice per customer. E.g. if the fixed amount is 100 Eur for the single/independent customer and there are 5 invoices for the other/different customers, and each invoice has for simplicity one material/SKU, so the 100 Eur is allocated proportionally to these 5 SKUs, so 20 EUR per SKU per customer. Can the CCM do that?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Calculating Energy Consumption in the Product Carbon Footprint
entry.content:
Hello,

yes, that is the ultimate intended goal. I think I will have to give up on doing it via PCFs and go with the CCFs as I realized that is probably the best approach for this during my conversation with @die_ste.

Thanks for sharing your approach! This is what I am going to do moving forward.

entry.title: Re: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crystal Reports Viewer
entry.content: Hi, DonWilliams. Thank you for your reply. We will send an image of the Windows Print dialog opened from our app. It opens when we click the Print button of the CR Viewer embedded in a VB.NET Form. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - Populating Dynamic Default Values in Analytical Model Variables
entry.content:
As @Nitin_Patni wrote, intervals are not yet possible in derived values.

A way to work around this:
In your temporal view, you could have two colums, one for your current date and one for the date two years ago.

In your AM you then have to use two filter variables on the billing date, one for start and one for end.

entry.title: Re: Calculating Energy Consumption in the Product Carbon Footprint
entry.content: Hi, thank you for the interesting roadmap! I think I understand what you mean, although my understanding is not quite deep enough to properly respond, I will keep this in mind. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process manager - attribute mass changes
entry.content: Hello, I see that this Help Documentation is not accessible currently. Could you please check if you have any other related Documentation

entry.title: Posting change to transfer SO stock is incorrectly asking for a reason for movement
entry.content:
When completing a posting change in EWM to move batch of 913108 from SO 5044582 to 5044581, the system would not proceed without a reason for movement being entered. 
Once entered, the Posting Change processed and updated in both EWM and IM - movement type 413.
A reason for movement was not required before - and should not be needed for this movement type

Attachment shows the error and the MB51 completed transactions after the reason for movement was added

How did you delete the activity? 

Best regards,

Ren

In body I add this:

{
    "DirectWhseTaskConfIsAllowed": true
}
 
and have error back from SAP:

HTTP request look like:

What am I doing wrong?

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process manager - attribute mass changes
entry.content:
Hi,
which link is not accessible? The first one requires login and a S-User, the second and third should be accessible, I just tested it. 
Edit: actually all 3 links are accessible without login. The single link shared above is outdated and should not be further used, you might require an S-User to access it.

Best regards
Manuel

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to maintain WBS element lv 2 to be rev...
entry.content: Well understood, Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process manager - attribute mass changes
entry.content:
Thanks Manuel for responding. I am looking at the following link posted by SOM.
https://help.sap.com/doc/sap-signavio-process-manager-api-documentation/SHIP/en-US/rest_api/index.html

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content:
I hit the same problem when sending test mail via "Monitor Email Transmission " app.

I read 1LQ setup guide and performed settings of below only. (i think other are not necessary for a simple email function test)

Defining an Email Sender Domain. 
Defining a Default Email Sender Address
Defining Email Receiver Addresses

for DKIM, it is required for SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition only.

Still checking, if no clue then may need to do below according to 3496200....

  • If the system is on SAP Public Cloud and the mail server is administrated by SAP, create case under component XX-S4C-OPR-INC .

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content: I hit the same problem when sending test mail via "Monitor Email Transmission" app.

entry.title: Carrier selection based on gross weight ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP TM experts,

I have a requirement from my customer and I am not sure it could be managed through standard features. Hereunder a few lines for this business requirement:

The customer wants to perform the carrier selection taking into account the gross weight of the truck. This weight limit can be different in function of the route of the trucks.

For example

From point A to point B, available carriers are

Carrier 1 between 10 and 25 tons

Carrier 2 between 10 and 25 tons

Carrier 3 for all the trucks under 10 tons.

 

From point A to point C, available carriers are

Carrier 1 between 12 and 25 tons

Carrier 2 between 12 and 25 tons

Carrier 4 for trucks under 12 tons.

 

In order to assign the carrier to the geographical attributes, the transportation lane seems to fit perfectly the requirement. On the other hand, it does not seem to handle such weight limitations.

I investigated also allocations but this object seems to be apply a limite on a period of time, not on each Freight Order.

A last possibility would maybe to deal with incompatibilities but i'm affraid to complexify a lot the solution for the users.

Did you already face this requirement ? Or maybe can you please suggest how you would handle it? 

Thank you for your help.

Best regards,

AdrienM

entry.title: Re: Removing comp planner name as suffix from Worksheet
entry.content: @Ritanshi, these functions are not applicable to Compensation and Variable Pay (I think they are applicable to Performance Management)

The 1QL setup guide did not update accordingly...

entry.title: Re: Inline translations do not work properly
entry.content: I'm pretty sure that this is an expected behavior from Stories. You need to translate all headers manually or build Query not in English system's set-up but in another language, that might help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Procurement Solutions for Airlines
entry.content:
Dear @ruby_hii 

I would like to see a demo of SAP Ariba Guided Buying & Opentext VIM, or SAP Ariba Guided Buying and Invoicing, with Opentext VIM.

I've searched on the SAP website and Opentext website but see none.  Do you know where there maybe a demo?  

Thank you for any help or suggestion!

Cheryl

entry.title: How to get the current date time of specific time zone in BPA
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to get the current date time of specific time zone (eg. AU time zone) in the BPA.

I used new Date() and it gets as GMT +0 time zone.

How can I convert to AU time zone?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: Method 'CREATE_STREAM' not implemented in data provider class( in RAP Application)
entry.content:
I have tried adding the file upload feature to my CDS i'm using Odata V2 like you and i can't even choose the file that i can upload it's like my field where i can upload the file is disabled when it is not.

I have checked everything and tried everything i even went so far by disabling the virus scan but always the same issue.
I started to wonder if it is even possible to implement the file upload feature for an Odata V2.

entry.title: INTRASTAT - goods from different country than the vendor how to exclude from report
entry.content: Hi how can we exclude from intrastat report cases in which the vendor lets say from Germany provides  goods lets say from Great Britain so it should not be in Intrastat report (because GB is outside EU) but it is because as per the vendor it is from Germany so we have to manually exclude it. Or other case how can we exclude in third party because lets say we buy goods from a country but physically it never reaches our country because we sell it further to our mother company in a different country but for different reasons we probably have to do GR and GI.

entry.title: Sap Cap Java does not process CDS files same way as nodejs
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Based on SAP CAP documentation in this link: 

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#mashing-up-with-remote-services

It seems to handle expands in Java we must take care of
request in our handler like in example:
https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-risk-management/blob/ext-service-s4hc-suppliers-ui-java/srv/src/main/java/com/sap/cap/riskmanagement/handler/RiskServiceHandler.java

But when we use this use case in nodejs, there is no
need to handle expands. It is handled by CAP libraries.
We just need to bind to Suppliers read event and send
the incoming CQN query to remote service and it is
done.


But in this way we need to also take care of nested
relations and there will be many boilerplate code. Is
there a library to handle CQN queries like in nodejs ?

entry.title: Re: Investment Support Measures for Assets SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello!

In new release 2502, there is functionality to manage grants (investmet support measures) in assets??

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process manager - attribute mass changes
entry.content: This link: https://help.sap.com/doc/sap-signavio-process-manager-api-documentation/SHIP/en-US/rest_api/index.html is outdated. You need to login via S-User to see it. However the same content is available here with new API endpoints: https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-manager/sap-signavio-process-manager-api/sap-signavio-process-manager-api-guide

entry.title: Re: Ariba Network + VIM in China via Baiwang
entry.content: Hi @Gaurav_Gautam Explorer - Could I ask where you would recommend to visualise demo's of Ariba and VIM? Thanks Cheryl

entry.title: Native driver not recognised
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to update my ADS system. Right when starting SUM I get the following error message:

 

I checked, and the driver is installed:

I also checked that I unpacked and started SUM with the SIDADM user as this caused some problems in the past.

Do you know what I need to check or edit to get SUM to use the driver?

I don't want to change the whole system to this driver, as ADS is using the SAP Standard driver.

entry.title: Re: Query-Based Approval Not Triggering Re-Approval in Sa...
entry.content:
Hi @sreesajs ,

In the version we are using here (2502), this is working fine. See our setup below:

The query we are using is very simple: 

SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE' 
FROM OPRQ 
WHERE $[$OPRQ.DocTotal] > 10000

And if any element of the approved draft is changed by the originator, the approval flow is triggered again until the approved draft is finally posted without any changes.

You may try something similar in your test environment to isolate the root cause, whether it is the setup, query or even SAP version.

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: ControllerExtension.use(EditFlow) with typescript does not work
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using typescript in my Fiori app and like to use EditFlow extension . I have a problem in initiating the EditFlow extension . 

 

 

import ControllerExtension from "sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension";
import EditFlow from "sap/fe/core/controllerextensions/EditFlow";
import Controller from "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller";

/**
 * @namespace paltr.core.configsystemkind
 */
export default class SetSystemKindsTitlesCustomAction extends Controller {
  private editFlow: EditFlow;
  public onInit(): void {

        this.editFlow = ControllerExtension.use(EditFlow);
    }
   ....
}

 

 

I'm not using the Babel plugin, I'm using the ui5-tooling.transpile version 3.7.2 instead as described in the Fiori documentation section "Assigning controller extension" Using Controller Extension - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

The mention "npm update" was executed.

My issue is ControllerExtension.use(EditFlow) throws the error "

Argument of type 'typeof EditFlow' is not assignable to parameter of type 'new () => EditFlow'.
Cannot assign a 'protected' constructor type to a 'public' constructor type.".
 
How do I call the extension correctly in typescript?

entry.title: Re: Posting Net Pay to Two Different GL Accounts
entry.content: Create two symbolic accounts and map the components you need ,, and assign those symbolic to two GL .

entry.title: Re: Add Relations in Operation using 'BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN'
entry.content:
Try calling BAPI_ALM_ORDER_GET_DETAIL to get some examples of data formats.

Also

  • Look at function modules such as MAP2E_RELATION_TO_EXTERN from the IBAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAPPING function group.
  • Check in table AUFK for AUFNR = 000004000001 or 000004001664 the values of field  AUTYP (20 = Network, 30 = PM order)

I suppose the following key is a bit wrong

 ls_methods-objectkey = 00000400000100200000040000010030.

 Try to replace the aufnr+vornr with aufpl+aplzl with data from table AFVC.

entry.title: New Cloud Outage Notification Subscription User Experience in SAP for Me!
entry.content:
The tool is designed to enhance the user experience for Cloud Outage Notification Subscription in SAP for Me. Here are the key capabilities:

  1. Subscription Management: Users, including regular s-users, Cloud Administrators, and Super Administrators, can create, display, change, or delete their own subscriptions for authorized Cloud Services and Systems.
  2. Creating New Subscriptions: Users can easily create new subscriptions by selecting "Add New Subscription" and choosing the type of subscription (Cloud Service or System). Multiple services can be selected, and the tool provides options to configure notification types such as Disruption/Degradation, Maintenance, Major Upgrade, and Customer Communication.
  3. Administrator Capabilities: Cloud Administrators and Super Administrators can manage subscriptions for other users, including non-s-users who can receive notifications but cannot access SAP for Me to manage their subscriptions.
  4. User-Friendly Interface: The tool offers a user-friendly interface with features like free text search, filters, and a clear display of selected items and conditions. It also provides insights through a question mark icon.
  5. Upcoming Features: The tool will soon include a feature for subscription on bundles, enhancing its functionality further.

 

Path in SAP for Me: Systems & Provisioning dashboard / Get Notified tab 

 

My Subscriptions (default screen)

As a regular s-user, Cloud Administrator, or Super Administrator, you can create, display, change or delete your own subscriptions for authorized Cloud Services and Systems.

 

To create a new subscription, select Add New Subscription in the top right corner.

 

In the popup, choose a Cloud Service or System subscription type.

If you are a Super Administrator with access to multiple entities of your Customer hierarchy, select one.

After selecting Cloud Service in the first filter, choose one or more Cloud Services in the subsequent popup.

To achieve this, you may utilize the Search text field or apply the available filters. Please be advised that we have updated the Product Group selection to Solution Area, to align the experience with other areas of SAP for Me. Once your selection is complete, please click OK.

 

 

Multiple services can be selected. The Selected Items and Conditions area will reflect your selection, as well as the number of Cloud Services chosen.

 

Click OK to confirm your choice and go back to the Add New Subscription screen.

Choose your Notifications Type Configuration: Disruption/Degradation, Maintenance, Major Upgrade, Customer Communication. For the initial three types, you will have the option to unsubscribe from certain alerts.

 

 

Click the question mark for insights.

 

After saving, your new notification will appear at the top of the list. Selecting multiple Cloud Services will create multiple subscriptions.

Clicking on the row will allow you to display and edit the Notification Type Configuration.

 

Creating a System level notification directs you to a screen to select specific systems, with two dedicated BTP filters available.

 

Depending on your system landscaped, the System Role may include:

 

Manage Subscriptions

As a Cloud Administrator or Super Administrator, you can create, display, change or delete subscriptions for other users. These users can be s-users or non-s-users. The non-s-users will be able to receive notifications, but not to access SAP for Me and manage their subscriptions.

In the Add Subscription screen, the Administrator selects one or more contacts along with the other fields.

 

 

The free text search will find the required contact(s) for the subscription.

 

In the main screen two perspectives are provided: By Subscriptions and By Subscribers.

 

By Subscriptions

Click on a Subscription to view the list of Subscribers.

 

By Subscribers

The User Type filter lets you choose between S-Users and Non-S-Users. While Non-S-Users can't access SAP for Me, an Administrator user can create subscriptions for them.

 

Click a Subscriber to view their subscriptions.

 

You have just learned how to use the new Cloud Outage Notification Subscription tool in SAP for Me!. Feedback is highly appreciated. Please use the comment section for that.

If you are interested in upcoming features, please follow my profile and the SAP for Me tag.

entry.title: Deployment is in Pending Status since 3 days in SAP AI launchpad - ML Deployment
entry.content:
Greetings Community Members!

Kindly help me with understanding on Deployment troubleshooting.  I have deployed a vision model using Postman, it was working well then I made some changes in re-deployed again. It has been in pending status since last 3 days.  Is there any ways to know Logs, debug, or troubleshoot deployment process ? in AI launchpad - ML( Deployment Section) Logs are very basic not providing more information,  is there any way we can see more detail logs for the deployment ?

Thank you
Best Regards
Naim 

 SAP AI Core

 # AI Launchpad 

#SAP ML Deployments

entry.title: Mass Data Changes for Master Data (General Ledger Accounts, etc.) Using SAP Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In the past, I used LSMW on R3 to change master data of G/L accounts or other FI objects en masse. As far as I know, there is the SAP Migration Cockpit as a successor to LSMW, but it can only be used to migrate new master data records for G/L accounts, for example.
I am looking for a Fiori app to change masses of existing master data of, for example, G/L accounts or other FI objects.
Can anyone help?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: how can i restrict the equipment that can be seen by users based on cost centers ?
entry.content:
Hello,

My client is using SAP public cloud, we are having a very weird problem on maintenance transactions : 

- Find technical objects

- Change technical object

we restricted the maintenance users using the restriction object "Cost center" in "General",

they can only see the equipment that have 4 specific cost centers, now here is the problem, some equipment don't have a cost center they have a WBS element instead, what we noticed is that those equipment with the empty field "cost center" can't be seen by the users on the transaction "Find technical object" but they can see it in "change technical object".

 

So basically, if the equipment has no cost center, they will not be able to access it only from the transaction change technical object.

anyone know why this is happening ?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: About SAP B1 10.00.120 WEB CLIENT OPEN IS BLANK PAGE
entry.content: When I open web clinet, I am prompted that sapui is out of date, as shown in the picture. What should I do to access web clinet normally?

entry.title: About sap b1 sdk use
entry.content:
private void OnCustomInitialize()
{
oForm = (SAPbouiCOM.Form)sbo_app.Forms.ActiveForm;


if (oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Count == 0)
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Add("dt");
}
else
{
try
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item("dt");
}
catch
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Add("dt");
}
}
string query = "SELECT u_t001 FROM [@itemproperties2]";
dt.ExecuteQuery(query);


Matrix0.Clear();


SAPbouiCOM.Column column = Matrix0.Columns.Item("cl_a");
column.DataBind.Bind("dt", "u_t001");


Matrix0.LoadFromDataSource();


if (Matrix0.RowCount > 0)
{

 


Matrix0.SelectRow(1, true, false);
}
}

I want to ask how to set martix to load data when it is opened? I set up the data source and bind data to the corresponding column, why is it not automatically loaded when it is opened, or why is it not displayed?

entry.title: Re: WEBI ERORR while opening dashboard
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I just found your message while I was getting the same error (after platform update) : this error is occuring after a document is promoted.

I know this is a brand new document in your case, but I share this Note SAP 3496871 in case of someone else reading us.

entry.title: Availability check for KMAT
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I've got an issue with availability check for KMAT. We've got in our company collective order implemented. Collective order consists of configurable materials. 

Main material is configurable and suborders are also based on configurable materials. 

We're facing an issue with creating delivery notes. Sales order consists of many items.

Scenario: Item 10 and 50 are already confirmed, delivered on stock. Sales people create partial delivery note. They do not check what was produced, they just create a delivery note. SAP allows them to create delivery note with items that were not produced. They can create delivery note i.e for items 20,30,50. 

How can I set the settings for availability check to prevent this problem? I would like that system takes into account only items which production orders were confirmed. 

Item category in sales order - STANDARD MTO. Schedule line category: CP.

Availability check in material master for delivery notes takes into account safety stock and include deliveries.

Does anybody encounter the same problem and has a solution? 

 

Regards,

MM

entry.title: Re: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content:
Dear Pekka,

Glad to see the progress!

The issue is that the app is already on the appstore since two years and that is the name of the app so I cannot change it. Hope you can fix the issue asap, thank you!

Interesting to understand why this problem happened while before there was no problem.

Best regards,

Chantal

entry.title: How to Add a Filter in SAP Cloud RESTful Application Programming Without Affecting Data Retrieval?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on a Fiori Elements application and want to add a new filter parameter (e.g., CustomDateFilter as shown in the screenshot). However, I don’t want this parameter to impact the actual data retrieval when clicking the Go button. Instead, I need it for additional processing or logic within the application.

How can I implement this in SAP Fiori Elements or RAP without affecting the dataset returned from the backend? Are there any best practices for handling such scenarios? (By the way i am using Restful Application Programming).

Thanks in advance!

entry.content:
Dear @RinkyKarthik, 

Thank you for the useful blog post. I am also interested in the ALP for TIH, so looking forward to your update(s) on this, when you have it ready for us 🙂  Warm regards, Emma

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Activity Error Encountered During Period Closing
entry.content: After confirming the approved network plan activity, we check the COFC screen and see that this confirmation is incorrect. While performing the CO material ledger period closing, the closing cannot be completed due to this network plan.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Activity Error Encountered During Period Closing
SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: Is there a way or a table which I can find the program that is generating the emails being sent out in SOST?

entry.title: Best Approach for Scheduled Trigger with User Credentials Input in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on an automation in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA) that connects to SAP S/4HANA using client-specific credentials. Currently, I am using environment variables to store login details, but I would like to improve the process by allowing my client to enter their own credentials before execution.

Additionally, I want this automation to be scheduled to run daily. The challenge is ensuring that the client enters their credentials once, and then the automation continues to run daily using those credentials, while keeping the process secure and user-friendly.

My current setup:

  • The automation connects to SAP S/4HANA using environment variables for credentials.
  • I fill those environment variables when deploying my project
  • I created a trigger to run my automation daily (from the control tower).
  • I want to replace hardcoded credentials with a way for users to input their login details (e.g., via a form).

Questions:

  1. What would be the best approach to allow users to input their credentials securely before execution?
  2. Is there a way to prompt users via a form before the scheduled job runs?
  3. Would creating a process with a form be a good alternative (if so, how would I make it so that it runs daily), or is there another recommended approach?

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am doing MTO Process in ECC System.I have done PGI/Billing, Now i am creating Return w.r.t to the Billing i have created the Return Sales Orders but while doing PGR It is showing me one error, attaching the screenshot as well.

Kindly look upon it and help me in this. I have seen various post posted in community but it not solve by issue

Pardeep

entry.title: How to Keep a Button Always Active in SAP Fiori Elements (RAP)?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am developing a Fiori Elements application using RESTful Application Programming (RAP). I have added a custom button (e.g., "KURBUTON"), but it appears inactive (disabled).  However, I want this button to be always active, regardless of whether any selections are made.

Here is the code I used for the button:

projection;

//strict ( 2 );

 

define behavior for ZC_ZBA_P_01 //alias <alias_name>

{

// use create;

// use update;

// use delete;

use action KURBUTON ;

 

// use function kurbuton;

 

}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


managed implementation in class zbp_i_zba_m_001 unique;

//strict ( 2 );

 

define behavior for ZI_ZBA_M_001 //alias <alias_name>

persistent table I_ExchangeRateRawData

lock master

authorization master ( instance )

//etag master <field_name>

{

// create;

// update;

// delete;

// field ( readonly ) ExchangeRateType, SourceCurrency, TargetCurrency, ValidityStartDate;

 

action ( features: instance) KURBUTON result[1]$self;

 

//function kurbuton result [0..*] $self;

}

entry.title: Service Layer doesn't trigger Approval SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello

We have an application that create sales order in SAP B1 via service layer

The sales order document has an approval process and it's work well in SAP B1

But when we do the same via Service layer , it's create the sales order directly and doesn't transform it on draft etc..

I activated the function 'Enable Approval Process in DI'

The user 'manager' trigger the approval when creating the document and is the same that we use in our test (Application and even via postman) the sales order is still created directly

{
    "CardCode": "CBONIFAIXD",
    "DocDueDate": "2025-03-14",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "71.150",
            "Quantity": "200"
        }
    ]
}

 

Can you please help ?

entry.title: Re: Convert canvas with jsPDF and upload to SAP, but corr...
entry.content:
const pdfGenerator = new jsPDF();
pdfGenerator .addImage(oImage,'JPEG',0,0);
const pdfPayload = pdfGenerator.output('blob');

This is how it works.

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content:
Which RFC connector does your WebSocket RFC server use? Is this another ABAP-based system?

Generally WebSocket RFC is not available in Cloud Connector, if your WebSocket RFC server is ABAP-based you can use classic RFC as mentioned in the blog post.

entry.title: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content:
hi,

in the new SAP Business One FP2502 there is a client crash.

The already deleted the screen lock in the common settings as also the screen lock value  in the user settings.

Is there a workaround or do we have to wait until the next hotfix.

best regards

Markus

entry.title: Re: Default value for buyer (old OMFI) in S/4HANA Cloud P...
entry.content:
Thank you, Jens_Koyen;

I find this odd that some configuration is possible creating a code for the default value for buyer (however only inforecord update option is included); and then it can not be assigned to anywhere.

Any idea, please, how to stop creating inforecord automatically (remove the default X), 2. getting PO price copied from previous PO in case no inforecord price maintained. How these could be achieved w/o parameter ID? I would appreciate hints for practical solution.

Thanks in advance

Maria

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024: Latest Updates to the Reimagined Applicant Management Tool in SAP SuccessFactors Recrui
entry.content:
Hello,

 

is it planned, that in 1H 2025 the Legacy Workbench will be deprecated? I couldn´t find any information.

Thank you

René

entry.title: Re: Where can we change the hire date
entry.content:
When you want to change the Hire Date, please pay attention to the following two points

****  It is Not Possible to Change the Hire Date for a Rehired Employee

****   If an employee was terminated and then rehired into another organization, then it is not possible to change its Hire Date anymore.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Tax entry not possible in this item IN SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you need to set up your G/L account master data properly. Looking at your post here, I would propose you read into this topic or reach out to a consultant.

 

As for your error message you receive when changing the tax code, there is a KBA (knowledge base article): https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3277130

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Runtime, trying to run report from vb....
entry.content: Thank you Don, I will give this a try. I also found out that there is firewall on the database port and I have to get access to it. I will post back with final results.

entry.title: Re: No authorization for a sales document
entry.content:
Hi Team

You might be missing SCC7 post processing steps after user master import in target system. Complete SCC7 should work

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content:
Hi GaryAu

Could you clarify what you mean that 1LQ is not correct?

From the setup guide for 2502 US (has been this way for many releases): 

What is your region? 

Thanks

Jerry

entry.title: Budget Threshold Alerts for Cost Centers
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and have enabled budget availability control for cost centers. and are wondering if there is any way to set up budget threshold alerting for cost center budgets.

Specifically, we would like to send an email to the cost center responsible (as assigned in the cost center master data) when the budget threshold is nearing 75%, so they do not have to regularly check the Cost Center Budget Report (F3871).

I know that with project budgets, this can be easily done using a predefined situation handling template (EPPM_PROJBUDGETTHRESHOLDEXCEEDED). However, I couldn't find anything similar for cost centers. Does anyone know how this can be achieved with reasonable effort?

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Simon

entry.title: Re: TomEE 10 has landed in SAP Java Buildpack 2!
entry.content:
Hi @veeraKallakuri,

If you don't have a manifest.yml or any file that's using SAP Java Buildpack (SJB), Tomcat or TomEE, then this update is just not relevant to your applications. 🙂 

I believe HTML5 apps don't use SJB. Probably the Node.js buildpack but can't tell without more context.

Best regards,  Gergana

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content: Hi Simon, i use the JavaConnector and the WebSocketServer is Java based.

entry.title: Retrieve characteristic values from the table for the customer material information record
entry.content:
Dear All,

We need to retrieve the characteristics values data from the table maintained against the customer material info in VD51

We could get the data from characteristics.

Pass the Class Name in KLAH and Class Type (052) in KLART and get CLINT

Then go to KSSK pass the CLINT and get OBJEK

 Then pass the OBJEK in AUSP get the ATWRT

But, We don't have the link between the condition record and characteristics value, Please suggest Linkage to get the values.

entry.title: Re: One-stop platform to catalog the skills & competencies in a systematic way- SAP SF Center of Cap
entry.content:
Hi @jahnavia

Can we use Skill Profile portlet while we are using capabilities portfolio.

entry.title: Re: SAC Hyperlink to SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hi @goekceakcetin,

Linking from SAC to SAP C4C is also possible.

See the following link for more details: How to construct a Deep link URL for C4C Business ... - SAP Community.

Hope this helps. Good luck!

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on...
entry.content: Hi Hadjolian,

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content:
Hi Andrzej,

so far, I was assuming that you were trying to call the WS-RFC Server from a Java application in SAP Public Cloud, but I guess that was wrong, and you are trying to make the call from an ABAP application (S/4 Hana or Steampunk system), right?

Here the problem is, that neither Simon nor me know exactly, how the configuration in a Cloud ABAP system looks like. I assume, when you tested your WS-RFC Server successfully from an on-premises ABAP system, you went to transaction SM59, created a destination of type "W" pointing to your JCo-Server and then used
CALL FUNCTION ... DESTINATION ...
in an ABAP report, right?

The question now is, how can a corresponding RFC destination be defined in a Cloud system. I think, here you have to configure some kind of "Communication Arrangement". Is it possible to add an HTTP Proxy here? In that case my original idea with an SCC-destination of type HTTP/HTTPS (instead of TCP) and "Allow WebSocket Upgrade" might work.

If not, I have another idea, however, it is a "bit of effort". (Depending on how many function modules your JCo-Server provides, and how "complicated" their signatures are.) HTTP via Cloud Connector is not difficult, and we have another tool that can convert an HTTP request (XML document or simply query parameters, if the function module has no structures/tables) into an RFC call: SAP Business Connector.
We could set up something like this:

  • ABAP code makes HTTP call via SCC to SAP BC
  • SAP BC converts to RFC and calls the WS-RFC Server
  • and then returns the result (e.g. XML,JSon) back to ABAP

If the first approach doesn't work, that might be an option.

entry.title: Closed configuration in the CBC
entry.content:
Hi, 

Regarding responses to the BDCQ for Quality Management, I have been exploring the configuration related to QM notifications in the CBC. To my surprise, I have found that most of the configuration is locked and cannot be modified, even though the BDCQ asks whether I want to change the configuration. The configurations that are not available are:

  • Define initial screens;
  • Assign catalogs to notification type
  • Define partner determination procedure
  • Assign partner procedure to notification type
  • Assign partner function to notification type 

Please check the attached images. 

Could you please explain the reason why the configuration is locked and whether there is a possibility to unlock it?

Thank you, 

Ana

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on...
entry.content: Use REV1 condition in the condition contract. It will split the value in the settlement document in proportion to the Business volume

entry.title: CDS View for Compliance Check: Which SAP User holds which values from an authorization object
entry.content:
Hi,

Requirement for compliance checks:
Is there a Standard CDS for Compliance checks, at best, listening all Users, Roles , Auth.objects and their values ?

Problem:
-Got some x100 SAP Users.
-The SAP users have a multitude of roles ( of course ...;).
-For compliance checks  I want to formulate a CDS view bringing
back all SAP users and the values of  a certain Role.

Example:
Got in many roles the authorization object F_BKPF_BUK

Want to have a list
SAP_USER   | BUKRS_VALUE
---------------+-----------------------+
MEUSER1      511
MEUSER2      803
..

or even better:

SAP_USER   | BUKRS_VALUE | AUTH_OBJECT | ROLE
---------------+-----------------------+---------------------+--------------------+
MEUSER1    | 511                      | F_BKPF_BUK   | Z1_M1_D_510
MEUSER2    | 803                      | F_BKPF_BUK   | Z1_M1_D_803
...

Solutions:
Standard CDS available ?
Any else ?

Demarcation:
Its  NOT searched how to authorize a CDS via a
CDS Auth. Object, for ex: ...(Bukrs) = aspect pfcg_auth(F_BKPF_BUK, BUKRS).

Thank You !

Best Wishes !
Martin

entry.title: SCU3 logs are showing TR number in upper landscapes when moving through TR
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We enabled scu3 change logging for couple of tables in SAP S/4 HANA system, we are facing an issue where when moving couple of changes from dev to test we see the changes logged in test system but in username field we see the TR number instead of users name. Can anyone help if there is a way to get this fixed?

We already got STMS parameters R3TRANSOPTIONS & RECCLIENT enabled in the system.

entry.title: Re: camt.053.001.02 Memo lines extracted from the wrong tab
entry.content:
Hello Elen,

In most circumstances we would expect -<TxDtls>/--<RmtInf><Ustrd>  - to be parsed as memo-line content in ISO20022 bank statements. This especially would be relevant for the automatic allocation of batch-transactions.

Please also refer to KBA: 3580826 - Memo Line Content Parsed in ISO20022 Bank Statements

When in doubt we ask to open a ticket with SAP Technical Support referencing this thread.

Best Regards,

Frank

entry.title: Authorization field cannot be deleted.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently occupied with the dismantling of obsolete transportation requests.

Here, a colleague has made some developments and transported them into the test system using transport of copies.

In the transport request, authorization objects and defined authorization fields were also created.

First, I took care of the authorization object. After extensive research, I found out that it cannot be deleted because it had been transported in the past (via copies). However, the transport occurred so long ago that the object is no longer to be found in the test system, as several system copies from the production to the test system have taken place since then. Therefore, I moved the object into a class of obsolete objects using SU21.

Now, to my actual problem: I wanted to delete the authorization field afterward, but this field is referenced in the previously mentioned authorization object, and I can't change that anymore. Consequently, I don’t have the option to delete the field using SU20.

The only solution that comes to mind, admittedly very unsightly, would be to simply delete the field using SE11. However, doing so would certainly not be advisable due to the resulting inconsistencies.

Does anyone have an approach on how I can remove the authorization field?

Many thanks in advance and kind regards!

entry.title: Re: Why is my profile history missing?
entry.content:
Hi @Alkay 
Meanwhile I reached out an SAP experts and discussed the issue you reported.
This is his recommendation:
For the missing learning history, please ensure you have a valid licenses and that you choose the ID associate with the subscription in SAP Universal ID pop-up.

 



Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Error "Failed to search Email"Failed to get Store"
entry.content:
@Sankara1:This error exists even with latest outloook SDK 1.72.18 and with agent version 3.39

Can you please help to resolve this error?

entry.title: How to set rounding for picking only a full HU or bag, even if the BOM requires less?
entry.content:
Hello!
Do you know how to set a rounding rule or someting for picking that makes the system to generate a warehouse task for moving the full bag or the full handling unit to the PSA and not just the quantity required for the production order?

Example: An ingredient is stored in bags of 5kg. The recipe to be made requires 7 kg of that ingredient, which is the quantity required from production/the factory. The warehouse has to take two bags to the production supply area so the production people manage whatever they need. How to set the Cloud Public system so it generates a warehouse task for moving the full 2 bags and not only 7 kg?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM - can't change actual completion date
entry.content: Hi, GillBegnor, Since you have already added/voted for this request in the Influencer Campaign, that is all you can do. Once there are enough users requesting the feature, it will be considered for implementation.

entry.title: Priority for source of supply determination
entry.content:
I want to know if possible to configure a rule for prioritizing the source of supply of a purchase requisition. 

1) I have 2 vendors which have source lists, info record but the system proposes both of them in the source of supply. We run MRP and the systema assignes one info record, what is the logic behind the selection?



2) I want when running MRP, there is one being selected over the other one without having to "fix" the vendor in the source list.. is this possible? if I enter a "1" in field MRP in source list, how would the system determine the source of supply then? 

 

Vendor 1 has 16 days delivery time, price for material is 187.68 EUR

Vendor 2 has 10 days planned delivery time and price 188.36 EUR

None of them have and agreement in place.

entry.title: Re: How to Mass Update or Add Distribution Chains and Sal...
entry.content:
Hello,

the fields VTWEG and VKORG are part of the org. level and therefore part of the table key. These fields cannot be changed, but you can add additional org. levels. 

As of my knowledge it is not possible with your app, but you can use the app "Mass Maintenance Material (old version)". 

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Activity Error Encountered During Period Closing
entry.content:
So the business transaction RKL 'Actual Activity Allocation' is not allowed for your network in its current status (Message BS 002)

  • Can you check in your system, with BS33 on 'RKL' → Where used icon, for system and user statuses that allow or prohibit the process?
  • Usually 'REL' would allow the process, but some user statuses or custom development may prohibit it?
  • You can also display the information from the display of statuses, click the i info icon.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to read the data from analytical view...
entry.content: Removed duplicates

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to read the data from analytical view...
entry.content:
Hi @Max_Gander,

May I ask if the ability to reference virtual data (from Datasphere) in SAC data action is already available in the current release of seamless planning?


Regards,

Ricky

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA 1610 SMART_BUSINESS_RUNTIME_SRV OData for Analytical Fiori App
entry.content: 3352062 - /SSB/SMART_BUSINESS_RUNTIME_SRV Backend Services not found

entry.title: Re: Approach for Transferring GSTIN from "Search Term 2"...
entry.content:
Did you try to use BAdI BADI_BUPA_GENERAL_UPDATE?

You could try to implement logic to read Search Term 2 from the ADRC table and identify the Business Partner being created. Populate the PAN field in the country-specific enhancement, create a BP and ensure GSTIN is automatically copied to PAN.

entry.title: Re: Copying condition type from Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
You could try to adjust the condition type configuration in V/06 and the pricing procedure in V/08, like below:

Check Condition Type (V/06):
Ensure "Header Condition" is enabled and uncheck "Item Condition" if it's set.

Adjust Pricing Procedure (V/08):
Ensure ZL03 is set as a header condition in the pricing procedure and remove it from item-level conditions.

Update Copy Control (VTAA - Quotation to Order):
Check pricing settings in header data.

Ensure pricing determination is not overriding header conditions.
After these changes, ZL03 should be editable at the header level in the Sales Order and greyed out at the item level.

entry.title: Re: What is the significance of Operation detail verifica...
entry.content:
When "Operation Det. Verif." is enabled, the system should checks all operation details when transferring operations from the Master Recipe into the Process Order.

This ensures, that any missing or incorrect data is validated before order creation. It prevents inconsistencies between the master recipe and the process order, ensuring correct execution. Even if a Production Version is used, this verification ensures that transferred operations comply with predefined standards.

In short, it should acts as an additional safeguard to maintain data accuracy during process order creation.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to read the data from analytical view...
entry.content: @Rick_L, no not yet. We are working on it. I hope it comes in 2025.

entry.title: Advantages of Proactive SAP IDM Migration
entry.content:
Preparing for SAP IDM’s End of Maintenance: Why Proactive Action Matters

SAP Identity Management (IDM) has long been a cornerstone of many organizations' Identity and Access Management (IAM) strategies. However, with the official end of maintenance set for 2027 (and extended maintenance only available until 2030), the clock is ticking for businesses relying on this solution. It’s critical to act now and start planning your journey to transition to another IDM system. Delaying the process could lead to unforeseen risks, such as compliance violations, operational disruptions, or increased migration costs.
Proactive migration allows you to mitigate these risks while seizing the opportunity to modernize and future-proof your IAM ecosystem. With a structured approach, you can transform this necessity into a strategic advantage.

 

Re-Engineering Your IAM Processes: A Unique Opportunity

Migrating from SAP IDM isn’t just about replacing one tool with another - it’s a chance to revolutionize your approach to identity and access management. Here’s why this transition offers unparalleled potential for improvement:

  • Redefine your IAM Requirements: Take this opportunity to collect updated business needs and redefine your identity management requirements.
  • Adapt to Hybrid or Cloud-Only Landscapes: Modernize your IAM processes to meet the demands of hybrid and cloud-first environments, ensuring flexibility and scalability.
  • Overcome Current Product Limitations: Address and eliminate process constraints imposed by your SAP IDM system, unlocking new possibilities.
  • Incorporate AI Capabilities: Integrate artificial intelligence into your IAM to enhance security, streamline operations, and automate decision-making.
  • Leverage the SAP Toolchain: Utilize powerful tools like LeanIX and Signavio to gain transparency, optimize processes, and ensure smooth integration throughout your migration.
    This project is your chance to align IAM processes with current and future business strategies, ensuring your organization stays ahead in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

The SAP IDM migration project is your chance to align IAM processes with current and future business strategies, ensuring your organization stays ahead in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

SAP IAM Reference Architecture (Source: SAP Discovery Center)

 

Expert Support for a Successful Transition

SAP Professional Services offers tailored guidance to help you migrate from SAP IDM effectively - the SAP IDM Migration Coach. Our offerings includes:

  • Expert coaching to navigate your migration journey with confidence.
  • Support for seamless integration of your next IAM solution.
  • Collaboration with Microsoft for Entra ID-based migrations.

Business outcomes with SAP Professional Services, you’ll achieve:

  • A smooth migration process, ready for future integration and compliance needs.
  • AI-compatible, future-resilient IAM systems built for the cloud.
  • Enhanced transparency and optimized user management using SAP tools like Signavio and LeanIX.

 

Get Started Today

Ready to embark on your SAP IDM migration journey? Find out more about the offering in SAP IDM Migration Coach - One Pager and get in contact with SAP Professional Services today to learn more about how our expert team can assist you in achieving a seamless and successful transition. Reach out to us and take the first step towards a future-ready Identity Management System.

 

Related Topics

Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027 (blog)

Migrate identity management scenarios from SAP IDM to Microsoft Entra (learning)

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Integration Framework Error
entry.content: same steps i hve followed, still getting same error

entry.title: Re: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
As I know, INSERT/UPSERT operations on Hybrid LOBs can have additional disk I/O overhead if the LOB size exceeds the configured memory threshold (default >1KB). Small LOBs stay in memory (delta store), larger ones go directly to disk. If exceeding the threshold, disk I/O happens during insertion, impacting performance. Hybrid LOBs do not use delta store like regular column data as I know, leading to direct disk writes.

For frequent INSERTs/UPSERTs, performance may degrade if large LOBs frequently exceed the threshold.

entry.title: Re: COND_COUNT - Cannot convert 123 into NUM: loss of sig...
entry.content: Check in your system for status of Note 2271617 - BAPI incompatibilities with respect to pricing field length extension (which added field COND_COUNT_LONG to some BAPI parameters)

entry.title: Flexnet Publisher runs out of Support
entry.content:
Hello,

We use sysam as our license-server and now the included flexnet publisher runs out of support. Are you planning to upgrade your sysam-installation? 

I would be very grateful if you would provide me with information.

 

 

 

best regards

 

Bernd


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Flexnet Publisher runs out of Support
entry.content:
Hello,

The upcoming SySAM 2.5 is scheduled to be released in PD 16.7 SP09, which is expected to be around the end of June.
Please note that timelines can sometimes change, and delays may occur.
You can find this information also in KBA 3583186 that SAP published today.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content: You should raise an issue to support.

entry.title: Re: Fetching Tax Categories from Sales org in sap mdg BP
entry.content: Since CL_MDG_BS_ECC_BP_CHECK_SERVICE -> DFLT_TAX_IND_READ_BY_VKORG has performance issues due to nested loops and multiple SELECTs, pleaase consider to try using CL_MDG_BS_BP_SERVICES for optimized data retrieval. If feasible, replace multiple SELECTs with a single CDS View or AMDP for better performance and implement parallelization if multiple sales orgs are involved.
